column2: This worksheet contains validated LOKI profil deployment metadata. Each row represents a sampling/deployment record.
description
Sampling station identifier or station code for the deployment/cast.
Calendar date associated with the sampling event. In the source workbook this may be stored as an Excel date value.
Time when the deployment started or when the instrument/net went in the water.
Cast identifier for repeated deployments at the same station.
Time when the deployment reached the bottom or target deepest point.
Time when the deployment ended or the instrument/net came out.
Maximum sampling or profiling depth associated with the profil.
Count/index field related to profil folders in the original workflow. The exact convention should be confirmed against the project protocol.
Whether the profil data were stored as zipped archives in the original workflow.
Combined date-time for the bottom or deepest point of the sampling event.
Combined date-time for the end of the sampling event or recovery.
Latitude recorded for the sampling event.
Longitude recorded for the sampling event.
Net mesh size used for sampling.
Net aperture/opening used for sampling.
Instrument name used for acquisition, such as LOKI.
Camera type or camera configuration used during acquisition.
Maximum sampling depth recorded for the deployment.
Station depth/deployment depth field from the source metadata. The exact convention should be confirmed from the acquisition protocol.
Name of the matched profil folder only, without the parent directory path.
